ai.title: AI Assistant Configuration
ai.enabledDesc: When enabled, Dashboard will show the AI chat button and enable background analysis
ai.apiKeyHint: The key is used locally only and is never sent to third parties
ai.analysisModelHint: Background analysis can use a cheaper model
ai.bgAnalysisDesc: Periodically analyze proxy logs to detect anomaly patterns
ai.enhanceNotifDesc: Add AI-generated context and suggestions to alert notifications
ai.noAnalysis: No analysis results yet. They will be generated automatically when background analysis is enabled.
ai.testFailed: Connection failed. Please check API Key and Base URL
ai.action.title: Action Confirmation
ai.error.requestFailed: Request failed. Please check AI settings.
ai.welcome.title: AI Assistant
ai.welcome.desc: I can query gateway status, manage routes and clusters, control circuit breakers, configure WAF, and more
ai.quick.healthPrompt: Show health status of all destinations and circuit breakers
ai.quick.trafficPrompt: Show traffic and error rate statistics for the last hour
ai.quick.routesPrompt: List all routes and their status
ai.history.title: Conversation History
ai.input.hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
